The '''Novolek system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Star/Legends|primary]] of the Novolek system was the [[Novolek Beacon/Legends|Novolek Beacon]], a [[Neutron star/Legends|pulsar]] star.

{{System-stub}}
